title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・到達

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
(I don't care how bad the track condition is! I just
need to focus on the finish line and run my race!)

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Rrraaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond finishes in first place! No mud
can sully the finest diamond! Just look at that
immaculate luster!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Satono Diamond was spectacular! I can't believe
she beat McQueen! Her talent is undeniable!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Even covered in mud, she stood tall and proud...
What a beautiful performance...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Gaaahhh! Grrr, I can't believe it!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I was in perfect condition! And yet...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
...I guess this just proves how strong you really
are, Dia.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I'll need to train even harder from now
on!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Right. And I'll be doing my best to keep you from
getting ahead of me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That was a marvelous run, Satono.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: McQueen! Thank you for saying so. But...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Is something the matter?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
The distance of the race afforded me an
advantage. A stayer like you excels at long
distances.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That may be true, but I'm the one who chose the
autumn Tenno Sho for our match.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I... I want to compete against you in a longer race
too!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I want to defeat you in a long-distance
showdown!
That's the spirit, Dia!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: How's this for an idea?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Let's all go head-to-head!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Y-yes, please! I'd love that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Goodness... You simply want to race Satono too,
don't you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hehe. ♪ Was it that obvious?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: The Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If there are no objections, let's race again at the
Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I'll be there too! So make sure to vote for me,
everyone!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Seriously?! I'm definitely voting for you both! Go
Teio! Go McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Then I'm going to enter too!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Me too! This will be a blast!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: WOOOOO!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The roar of 60,000 spectators shakes the stands.
The Arima Kinen will be the race of the century.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Standing among the thunderous cheers of joy
reverberating throughout Tokyo Racecourse,
refusing to enter the Arima Kinen was never a
realistic option.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Um... McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Is it okay if I ask you something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Of course.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...Why did you decide to race against us?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Watching you two compete lit a fire in me. I also
considered it my obligation as a member of the
Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Your obligation?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You wish to ask me about how I conduct myself,
correct?

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Yes. You've become a very illustrious runner
through all of your efforts. The Satono family's
dream is to have someone like to you.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I believe you competed against us today because
that is how an illustrious runner should conduct
themself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Yes, you're exactly right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I take it upon myself to use my incredible talent
on proving that the Mejiro family is a prominent
part of the Umamusume world.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
The spring Tenno Sho is a special race both to me
and the Mejiro family... I feel compelled to
challenge any powerful competitors who excel in
it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And that's not all. I will, of course, compete with
Umamusume who have proven themselves in the
Twinkle Series.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I will also accept any challenge from emerging
Umamusume like yourself, before proceeding to
defeat them with my overwhelming strength.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And by doing so, the reputation of Mejiro name
endures.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: That is how I choose to conduct myself.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
So you do it to uphold the pride of the Mejiro
family...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
However, the Mejiro and Satono families are in
different situations.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Your family's reputation within the world of
Umamusume originates with you, Dia.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That is why there are surely paths you can take
that differ from my own.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: My family's reputation... begins with me...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, McQueen. I'll try thinking about this
some more.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Please do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
May light guide you along the path you choose.
Farewell.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: ...McQueen truly is so wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I really respect her for that unwavering belief she
has in her purpose as an illustrious runner!
choice_data_list: I'm glad you could learn something from her.
I'm glad you could learn something from her.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Me too! I'm going to follow her advice and think
about the kind of Umamusume I hope to
become...

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
I'd like to be able to give her my answer when we
compete in the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Racing in the Arima Kinen may provide Satono
Diamond with an answer that'll guide her along
the path to becoming an illustrious runner.
